name: Sherried Chicken Livers
recipeIngredient: 3 slices Bacon, cut crosswise into 1/2-inch-wide strips
1 lb Chicken livers, cut into halves
1/4 lb Large mushrooms, sliced or quartered
Grated Parmesan cheese, to pass as condiment
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the bacon slices in a large heavy skillet over medium heat. Drain on paper towels.
2. Sprinkle the chicken livers with salt and pepper. Cook in bacon drippings until well browned. Remove the cooked chicken livers to a plate as they are browned.
3. Add onions and mushrooms to the skillet pan. Cook, stirring, until mushrooms are tender and lightly browned.
4. Add garlic, basil, oregano, and savory. Blend in tomato paste, sherry, and broth.
5. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally for about 10 minutes.
6. When the sauce thickens, return the chicken livers to the sauce and any liquid that accumulated while they stood. Cook just until the livers are heated through, about 2 or 3 minutes.
7. Adjust seasonings with salt and pepper. Sprinkle with parsley and serve hot over rice, polenta, or pasta.
Serves 4.
